login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your account credentials to access your dashboard.
login.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Choose your account type based on the Week 1 architecture.
register.passwordHint: Use at least 10 characters with upper, lower, number, and symbol.
register.registrationFailedInput: Registration failed. Please check your input.
register.registrationSuccessVendor: Account created. After sign-in you will finish opening your store.
register.accountTypeCustomerHint: Shop products, wallet access, and affiliate profile.
register.accountTypeVendorHint: Seller account — after sign-in, complete store setup before using the vendor dashboard.
register.accountTypeBothHint: Start with both customer and vendor capabilities.
register.invalidName: Enter a valid name using letters, numbers, spaces, or . ' -
register.invalidPassword: Password must be at least 10 characters and include upper, lower, number, and symbol.
register.invalidReferral: Referral code must be 4–24 letters or numbers.
register.emailInUse: This email is already in use.
register.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.

customerDashboard.title: Customer Dashboard
customerDashboard.subtitle: Shop, manage your cart and profile, checkout, and track orders from here.
customerDashboard.fromYourOrdersCategoriesSubtitle: Based on products you've ordered before.
customerDashboard.fromYourStoresSubtitle: New listings from vendors in your order history.
customerDashboard.buyersAlsoBoughtSubtitle: Popular pairings from orders like yours.
customerDashboard.noProductsInSection: Nothing to show here yet — check back soon.

customerAffiliate.title: Affiliate program
customerAffiliate.subtitle: Share your referral link worldwide. Your network is global; commissions for this marketplace appear below.
customerAffiliate.globalTreeHint: Your referral network is global — one code works in Saudi, Oman, Egypt, and Global. When someone in your downline orders in another marketplace, you still earn; that commission goes to your wallet in that order's market.
customerAffiliate.commissionsMarketHint: Commission history below is for the active marketplace only. Switch marketplace from the header to view earnings in Saudi, Oman, Egypt, or Global.
customerAffiliate.enrollBody: Get your own referral code and earn commissions when referred customers complete paid orders.
customerAffiliate.profileLink: Edit referral code in profile settings
customerAffiliate.downlineEmpty: No one has registered with your code yet.
customerAffiliate.commissionsWalletHint: Pending and approved amounts also appear in your wallet.
customerAffiliate.genealogyTruncated: Showing a limited portion of your network.
customerAffiliate.withdrawHint: Withdraw available balance from your wallet (affiliate earnings and cashback).
customerAffiliate.promoIntro: Join our affiliate program, share your personal link, and earn commissions on up to {depth} levels when referred customers complete paid orders. You can be a shopper and an affiliate at the same time.
customerAffiliate.howItWorks1: Activate your free affiliate profile and get a unique referral code.
customerAffiliate.howItWorks2: Share your registration link — friends who sign up with your code become part of your network.
customerAffiliate.howItWorks3: When they (or customers in your upline chain) complete a delivered, paid order, eligible affiliates earn a share of that order.
customerAffiliate.howItWorks4: Commissions are credited to your wallet as pending, then move to available after the settlement period ({settlementDays} days).
customerAffiliate.levelsTitle: Commission levels (share of the {poolPercent}% affiliate pool)
customerAffiliate.levelsFootnote: *Example per {currency} 100 eligible order amount (product subtotal minus discounts, excluding shipping and VAT). Pool = {poolPercent}% of eligible amount.
customerAffiliate.exampleBody: On a {currency} 100 eligible order, the affiliate pool is {currency} 10. Level 1 earns {l1Percent}% of the pool ({currency} {l1Example}); deeper levels earn smaller shares up to level {depth}.
customerAffiliate.benefit1: No fee to enroll — activate anytime from this page or your profile.
customerAffiliate.benefit2: Track direct referrals and every commission in one place.
customerAffiliate.benefit3: Up to {depth} upline levels — grow passive income as your network shops.
customerAffiliate.refundsNote: If an order is fully refunded, related affiliate commissions are reversed automatically (same as cashback).
customerAffiliate.compactWhenEarn: You earn when referred customers in your network complete paid, delivered orders. Eligible amount = product subtotal minus discounts. Pool = {poolPercent}% of eligible amount.
customerAffiliate.compactRefunds: Refunds reverse related commission lines in your wallet.

customerCashback.title: Wallet
customerCashback.subtitle: Cashback, affiliate commissions, and your balance activity.
customerCashback.rulesBody: When an order is marked delivered (completed) and paid, you receive {rate}% of the order total as cashback in your wallet. Approved returns refund the order total to this wallet and reverse any cashback from that order.
customerCashback.rulesAffiliateBody: When a referred customer’s order is completed and paid, upline affiliates earn a share of the eligible order amount. Pending commissions appear in your history until they are approved.
customerCashback.emptyHistory: No wallet activity yet. Complete a paid order to earn cashback.
customerCashback.withdrawHint: Available balance can be withdrawn after admin approval.
customerCashback.withdrawMinHint: Minimum withdrawal: {amount}. Funds are locked until admin approves and marks the bank transfer paid.
customerCashback.otherMarketsHint: Switch marketplace from the header to view activity or withdraw from another market wallet.
customerCashback.kycRequiredBanner: Identity verification is required before you can withdraw. Upload your ID and IBAN, then wait for admin approval.
customerCashback.kycExpiredBanner: Your identity document has expired. Upload a valid document to withdraw again.

homePage.heroTitle: Shop trusted sellers. Earn rewards as you grow.
homePage.heroSubtitle: Discover products from independent stores, pay securely at checkout, and unlock wallet cashback on every completed order.
homePage.valueMultiVendorDesc: Browse catalogs from verified marketplace vendors in a single cart.
homePage.valueCashbackDesc: Earn cashback on delivered orders and manage balance in your customer wallet.
homePage.valueCheckoutDesc: Review your cart, choose shipping, and place orders with clear totals.
homePage.valueSellerDesc: Vendors get dashboards for products, orders, coupons, and payouts.
homePage.featuredProductsSubtitle: Fresh listings from our marketplace vendors.
homePage.noProducts: New products are on the way. Check back soon.
homePage.ctaSubtitle: Create a free account to save your cart, track orders, and earn cashback—or apply to sell on the marketplace.

siteFooter.tagline: Multi-vendor marketplace with wallet, cashback, and affiliate rewards.
siteFooter.support: Contact support via your order page

contactPage.title: How can we help?
contactPage.subtitle: Send us your inquiry or describe the problem you are facing. Our support team will review your message.
contactPage.locationText: Visit our headquarters location in Oman.
contactPage.messagePlaceholder: Describe your inquiry or problem clearly…
contactPage.successMessage: Thank you. Our support team will review it and contact you by email if needed.
contactPage.error: We could not send your inquiry. Please check the fields and try again.
contactPage.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait before trying again.
contactPage.privacy: Your details are used only to review and respond to this inquiry.
contactPage.invalidName: Enter a valid name using letters only.

customer.title: International Shopping Notice
customer.body: Prices in the global store are in US dollars. The receiving country may impose additional charges or requirements that are not included in the order or shipping cost and are the customer's responsibility.
points: Taxes imposed by the receiving country
Import restrictions, permits, or other legal requirements
customer.saveError: Could not record your acknowledgement. Please try again.
customer.checkoutBody: Additional customs duties, taxes, clearance fees, or import requirements may apply in the receiving country and are your responsibility.

vendor.title: International Sales Notice
vendor.intro: You have chosen to make your products available for international sale. By continuing, you acknowledge and agree to:
vendor.point1: Comply with the export laws and regulations of your country of business.
vendor.point2: Comply with import restrictions and customs requirements in destination countries.
vendor.point3: Ensure products are permitted for export and accurately describe their origin, value, and classification.
vendor.point4: Accept responsibility for duties, delays, confiscation, regulatory action, or fines relating to your products.
vendor.platformClause: FOURCES provides the technical platform only and is not responsible for customs or regulatory decisions made by the relevant authorities.
vendor.agreement: I agree to the International Sales Notice and merchant responsibility clause.
vendor.error: Could not save your agreement. Please try again.
vendor.ownerOnly: The store owner must accept this agreement before team members can use the GLOBAL vendor portal.

affiliate.title: International Marketing Notice
affiliate.body: You are responsible for complying with the e-marketing, advertising, consumer-protection, tax, and other applicable laws in the country where you operate and in every country targeted by your campaigns.
affiliate.platformClause: FOURCES provides the technical platform only and is not responsible for violations, restrictions, or legal requirements related to your marketing activities.
affiliate.agreement: I agree to the International Marketing Notice and marketer responsibility clause.
affiliate.error: Could not save your agreement. Please try again.

agreementRecord.pendingHint: This agreement has not been accepted yet. Review and accept it on:

sellOnboarding.title: Become a Seller
sellOnboarding.subtitle: Create your account and open your store on our marketplace.
sellOnboarding.slugInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
sellOnboarding.planDescription: Start selling with unlimited products on the marketplace. Paid plans coming later.
sellOnboarding.acceptPlan: I agree to the seller terms and free plan
sellOnboarding.successBody: Sign in to manage your store and add products.
sellOnboarding.loggedInSubtitle: You're signed in. Complete your store profile to start selling.
sellOnboarding.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
sellOnboarding.invalidPassword: Password must be at least 10 characters and include upper, lower, number, and symbol.

publicStores.listSubtitle: Browse independent sellers on the marketplace.
publicStores.empty: No stores yet. Be the first to sell!
publicStores.noProducts: This store has no products listed yet.

productCatalog.title: Products
productCatalog.subtitle: Active listings from marketplace vendors.
productCatalog.empty: No products are available yet. Check back soon.
productCatalog.emptyFiltered: No products match your filters. Try adjusting or clear filters.
productCatalog.loginToAdd: Sign in with a customer account to add items to your cart.
productCatalog.checkoutNextStep: Open your cart to review items and complete checkout.

productQuestions.title: Questions & answers
productQuestions.empty: No answered questions yet. Be the first to ask.
productQuestions.askPlaceholder: What would you like to know about this product?
productQuestions.askSuccess: Your question was sent to the seller.
productQuestions.loginToAsk: Sign in as a customer to ask a question.

customerCheckout.title: Checkout
customerCheckout.subtitle: Review totals, pick a delivery address, then choose how to pay.
customerCheckout.emptyCart: Your cart is empty. Add items before checkout.
customerCheckout.shippingVatNote: VAT is calculated on subtotal plus shipping minus any coupon discount.
customerCheckout.paymentCodHint: Pay when your order is delivered. Payment stays pending until collection.
customerCheckout.paymentCardHint: Pay securely by card. You will choose a payment gateway, then complete checkout.
customerCheckout.paymentCoveredByWalletHint: Your wallet fully covers this order. No extra payment method is required.
customerCheckout.codOnlyNote: Payment method: cash on delivery (COD). Payment stays pending until collected on delivery.
customerCheckout.gatewayPickerSubtitle: Select how you want to pay online. More regional gateways are planned next.
customerCheckout.gatewayComingSoonHint: Planned for a future release. Not available yet.
customerCheckout.couponInvalid: This coupon code is not valid for your cart.
customerCheckout.walletUse: Use available wallet balance for this order
customerCheckout.walletNoBalance: You have no wallet balance available for this order.
customerCheckout.profileIncomplete: Add a saved delivery address on your profile, or complete the billing address and phone below.
customerCheckout.shipToHint: The order will use the phone and address shown below for delivery.
customerCheckout.cancelledNote: Card payment was cancelled. Your cart and checkout details are saved, so you can try again whenever you're ready.
customerCheckout.deliveryMismatchTitle: Delivery address does not match this marketplace
customerCheckout.deliveryMismatchBody: Your saved addresses are for another country. Switch to the correct store for that address, or add a delivery address in this marketplace.

customerCheckoutSuccess.title: Payment
customerCheckoutSuccess.signInHint: Sign in to view your order after payment.
customerCheckoutSuccess.missingSession: Missing payment session. If you completed payment, open your orders list.
customerCheckoutSuccess.confirmError: We could not confirm your payment yet.
customerCheckoutSuccess.confirmErrorHint: If you were charged, check Orders in a moment or contact support.

toast.registered: Account created — sign in to continue
toast.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

marketPicker.title: Choose your marketplace
marketPicker.subtitle: Select the country store you want to shop in. You can change this anytime.

SA.description: Shop in Saudi Arabia — prices in SAR

OM.description: Shop in Oman — prices in OMR

EG.description: Shop in Egypt — prices in EGP

customerOrders.title: Order History
customerOrders.subtitle: Track and review your previous orders in one place.
customerOrders.emptySubtitle: When you place your first order, it will appear here with full status tracking.

customerOrderDetail.title: Order details
customerOrderDetail.noItems: No products are listed for this order yet.
customerOrderDetail.delayNoticeBody: Your order is taking longer than expected. We are following up with our sellers and will update you soon.
customerOrderDetail.shippingLegacy: This order has no saved shipping snapshot (placed before address capture was enabled).
customerOrderDetail.invoiceRowPending: Available after the 15-day return window closes
customerOrderDetail.invoiceRowNotEligible: Available after the order is completed, paid, and delivered
customerOrderDetail.returnWindowHint: Returns are available while payment is completed and within 15 days after delivery.
customerOrderDetail.returnsComingBody: The return wizard (reasons, photos, policy) will open here. You can still use support for urgent issues.
customerOrderDetail.wrongMarketBody: This order belongs to {market}. Switch to that store to view it.
customerOrderDetail.notFoundBody: We could not find this order in your account for the current marketplace.

customerOrderLineRating.commentPlaceholder: Share details to help other buyers (optional).

customerOrderInvoice.title: Order summary
customerOrderInvoice.subtitle: Printable receipt for your purchase
customerOrderInvoice.notEligibleBody: This summary is available only after the order is completed, paid, and delivered.
customerOrderInvoice.gateClosedBody: This summary is available after the 15-day return window closes.

customerOrderInvoices.title: Tax invoices
customerOrderInvoices.gateClosed: Vendor tax invoices are available after the 15-day return window closes.
customerOrderInvoices.orderNotEligible: Tax invoices are available only after the order is completed, paid, and delivered.
customerOrderInvoices.profileIncomplete: This vendor is still completing their invoice profile.

customerReturnStart.title: Return request
customerReturnStart.intro: Tell us why you are returning this order, add details, and confirm the return policy.
customerReturnStart.notFound: We could not load that order for your account.
customerReturnStart.notEligible: This order is not eligible for a new return right now. Check the order page for the return window and payment status.
customerReturnStart.openReturnRedirect: You already have a return in progress for this order. We sent you to that case.

customerReturns.listSubtitle: Track return requests linked to your orders.
customerReturns.emptySubtitle: When you submit a return request, it will appear here with full tracking.
customerReturns.emptyFiltered: No returns match your filters. Try adjusting status or dates.
customerReturns.empty: You have not submitted any returns yet.
customerReturns.wizardSubmitError: We could not submit your return. Check your details and try again.
customerReturns.wizardPolicyIntro: By continuing you confirm that the information you provide is accurate and that you accept our return handling process.
customerReturns.wizardPolicyCheckbox: I have read and accept the return policy for this request.
customerReturns.wizardDetailsHint: Describe the issue (required). Up to 4,000 characters.
customerReturns.wizardSelectReason: Choose the reason that best matches your situation.
customerReturns.wizardSelectUnitsHint: You can return one or more units from this order (partial return).
customerReturns.wizardLoadUnitsError: Could not load returnable items for this order.
customerReturns.refundRejectedMessage: This return was rejected during inspection. See the reason below.

SUBMITTED.title: Return requested
SUBMITTED.description: We received your return request and will start processing it.

RECEIVED.title: Item received
RECEIVED.description: Returned items are checked in at our warehouse or pickup point.

INSPECTION.title: Inspection & decision
INSPECTION.description: We verify the items and decide whether the return is approved.

REFUND.title: Refund processing
REFUND.description: Finance is executing your refund to the original payment method or wallet.

COMPLETED.title: Refund completed
COMPLETED.description: The refund has been credited. Check your wallet or card statement.

orderReturnReason.DONT_WANT: Changed my mind / no longer want the items
orderReturnReason.WRONG_ITEM: Wrong item or not as described
orderReturnReason.USED: Item appears used or not in new condition

customerProfile.title: Customer Profile
customerProfile.subtitle: Manage your identity and address details used for checkout and order history.
customerProfile.billingSectionHint: Used for invoices. Checkout can use a saved delivery address below instead; empty fields are filled from your default saved address for editing.
customerProfile.shipSameAsBilling: Ship to the same address as billing
customerProfile.shippingSectionHint: When different from billing, enter the full delivery address below.
customerProfile.affiliateSectionHint: Create your affiliate profile to get your own referral code and share link.
customerProfile.affiliateCodeInvalid: Referral code must be 4-24 letters or numbers.
customerProfile.affiliateCodeHelpEditable: You can edit this code until someone registers using it. After first successful use, it becomes locked.
customerProfile.affiliateCodeHelpLocked: This code is locked because it has already been used by at least one referral.

customerShippingAddresses.sectionHint: These addresses appear at checkout so you can pick where each order ships. Your billing address stays in the form above.
customerShippingAddresses.empty: No saved addresses yet. Complete your profile above, then add an address here.

vendorAccess.title: Access restricted
vendorAccess.body: Your account does not have permission to view this page. You will be redirected to an area you can access.

vendorDashboard.title: Vendor Dashboard
vendorDashboard.subtitle: Track performance, finish store setup, and manage catalog and orders.

adminShippingRequests.title: Shipping approvals
adminShippingRequests.subtitle: Review vendor shipping mode and fee change requests.
adminShippingRequests.defaultRejectReason: Does not match platform shipping policy.

vendorSetup.title: Store setup
vendorSetup.subtitle: Finish these steps so buyers trust your store.
vendorSetup.stepBrandingHint: Add a logo and banner URL (hosted image links).
vendorSetup.stepShippingHint: Choose how you fulfill orders. Changes require admin approval before they apply.
vendorSetup.shippingModeDirect: Direct — I ship from my stock
vendorSetup.indirectForseizStock: Warehouse A — stock at Fources (0 SAR default)
vendorSetup.indirectOnOrder: Warehouse B — on-order supply (20 SAR default)
vendorSetup.shippingStatusPendingRequest: You have a pending change request
vendorSetup.stepPayoutHint: Bank details for future payouts (stored securely).
vendorSetup.saveError: Could not save. Check the form.

vendorProducts.title: Products
vendorProducts.subtitle: Create products, submit for approval, and manage listing status.
vendorProducts.saveError: Could not save. Check the form and try again.
vendorProducts.empty: No products yet. Add your first product to start selling.
vendorProducts.rejectedNote: Rejected by admin — edit and resubmit for review.
vendorProducts.editPendingNote: An edit request is pending admin review.
vendorProducts.newProductsDraft: New products start as drafts. Submit when ready to sell.
vendorProducts.importNoPermission: You need product write permission to import CSV files.
vendorProducts.deleteErrorOrders: This product was used in orders and cannot be deleted.
vendorProducts.formFulfillmentHint: How this product is shipped. Checkout charges one fee per vendor per fulfillment type.
vendorProducts.formImagesHint: Add at least one image. Use “Set as cover” for the photo shown in listings (carousel still uses all images).
vendorProducts.formActive: Product is active and visible in the catalog
vendorProducts.formMetaTitleHint: Max 70 characters. Leave empty to use the product name.
vendorProducts.formMetaDescriptionHint: Max 160 characters. Shown in Google and social previews.

vendorTeam.title: Team
vendorTeam.subtitle: Invite staff by email. They sign in and accept the invite to access your store with selected permissions.
vendorTeam.inviteSuccess: Invite created. Copy the link for your teammate.

vendorPlans.title: Plans & bills
vendorPlans.subtitle: Your marketplace plan and fee invoices (read-only stub until billing is integrated).
vendorPlans.planStubNote: Plan upgrades and online payment are not enabled in this release. Contact support for billing changes.

teamAccept.title: Join a store team
teamAccept.subtitle: Accept an invitation to help manage a vendor store.
teamAccept.loginRequired: Sign in with the invited email address first, then return to this page.
teamAccept.revoked: This invite is no longer valid.

vendorProductImport.title: Import products (CSV)
vendorProductImport.subtitle: Upload up to 50 products per file. New rows are created as drafts for your review workflow.
vendorProductImport.columnsHelp:
Required: name, price, category (slug or id, e.g. electronics), image_url (full URL or /uploads/... path).
Optional: qty (ignored until inventory is added).
vendorProductImport.fileHint: UTF-8 CSV with a header row. Maximum 50 data rows per upload.

vendorOrders.title: Orders
vendorOrders.subtitle: Orders that include your products. Status can be updated only when the order is from your store alone.

detail.noItems: No products are listed for this order yet.
detail.singleVendorLinesHint: Fulfillment status follows the order status above. Other vendors' products are not shown.
detail.statusReadOnly: No further status changes are available from this state.
detail.multiVendorHint: This order includes products from multiple vendors. Order status is coordinated by the platform.
detail.fulfillmentGroupsHint: Update Direct and Warehouse B shipments yourself. Warehouse A is fulfilled by the platform.
detail.platformHandledHint: This order is fulfilled entirely from the Fources warehouse. The platform will handle shipping — you do not need to update status.
detail.escalationReminder: Platform reminder: please ship your items for this order.
detail.escalationWarning: Platform warning: this order is overdue. Ship as soon as possible.
detail.escalationEscalation: Urgent: platform escalation on this order. Contact support if you need help.
detail.removedBannerTitle: You were removed from this order by platform admin.
detail.fulfillmentGroupStatusHint: Overall order status updates when every fulfillment group is shipped.
detail.lineStatusHint: Visible to admin. Admin updates overall order status after vendor lines progress.
detail.paymentStatusHint: Mark Paid when cash on delivery is collected. Refunds are handled by the platform.
detail.paymentNoPermission: You do not have permission to change payment status. Ask the platform admin to enable “Update payment status” for your store.
detail.commissionInvoiceGateClosed: Available after the customer return window closes (15 days after delivery).
detail.commissionInvoiceOrderNotEligible: Available only when the order is completed, paid, and delivered.

vendorReviews.title: Customer reviews
vendorReviews.subtitle: Ratings left by buyers after completed, paid orders.
vendorReviews.filteredByLine: Showing rating for one order line.

vendorCoupons.empty: No coupons yet. Create your first discount code.

vendorPayout.title: Payout & wallet
vendorPayout.subtitle: Your vendor wallet balance, recent pay-ins (earnings), and payouts (withdrawals).
vendorPayout.emptyPayIn: No pay-ins yet. Earnings appear here when orders settle to your wallet.

vendorOperations.title: Operations ledger
vendorOperations.subtitle: All wallet credits (+) and debits (−): earnings, reversals, withdrawals, and adjustments.
vendorOperations.emptySubtitle: Earnings, reversals, withdrawals, and adjustments will appear here.

vendorStore.title: Store settings
vendorStore.subtitle: Your store name is shown to customers with your products.

form.metaTitleHint: Max 70 characters. Leave empty to use the store name.
form.metaDescriptionHint: Max 160 characters for search and social previews.

vendorInvoiceProfile.title: Invoice profile
vendorInvoiceProfile.subtitle: Legal details printed on customer tax invoices and used for commission invoices.

form.vatTrnRegistered: I am VAT registered (have a TRN)

form.vatPercentHint: Enter the VAT rate that applies to your business (for example, 15 for Saudi Arabia).
form.logoUrlHint: Public HTTPS URL shown on PDF invoices.
form.completeHint: Fill in all required fields so customers can download tax invoices for your products.

adminContactInquiries.title: Contact inquiries

adminContactInquiries.name: Customer

adminProductApproval.title: Product approvals
adminProductApproval.subtitle: Review pending listings and see approval history.
adminProductApproval.emptyApproved: No approved products in history yet.
adminProductApproval.emptyRejected: No rejected products in history yet.
adminProductApproval.rejectDialogDescription: The vendor will see this reason. The live product stays unchanged for edit rejections.

adminDashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
adminDashboard.subtitle: Operate the marketplace: orders, accounts, vendors, and pending withdrawals.

adminAnalytics.title: Analytics
adminAnalytics.subtitle: Platform KPIs and trends (non-cancelled orders). Last 30 days for time series.

adminVendorPermissions.title: Vendor permissions
adminVendorPermissions.subtitle: Control what this store can do in the vendor portal. No rows saved means full access.
adminVendorPermissions.defaultAccessNote: This vendor currently has default full access (no restrictions saved). Check boxes and save to restrict.
adminVendorPermissions.restrictedNote: Only checked permissions are allowed for this vendor.

adminOrders.title: All orders
adminOrders.subtitle: View every order and update status on behalf of the platform (including multi-vendor orders).

detail.noItems: No products are listed for this order yet.
detail.completeBlockedHint: You cannot complete this order yet.
detail.vendorProgressHint: {count} vendor line(s) are still not marked completed.
detail.statusReadOnly: No further status changes are available from this state.
detail.paymentStatusHint: Admin only. Set to Paid when cash on delivery is collected (needed for cashback and returns).
detail.invoicesHint: Generated after the return window closes. Downloads are logged for audit.
detail.invoicesUnavailable: Invoices are not available yet. The order must be completed, paid, delivered, and past the return window.
detail.warehouseFulfillmentHint: Ship items stocked in the Fources warehouse. Vendors cannot update this group.

stuckList.title: Stuck fulfillment
stuckList.empty: No stuck fulfillment groups right now.
stuckList.slaBypassHint: SLA bypass is on (FULFILLMENT_SLA_BYPASS=true) — nothing is flagged as stuck.
stuckList.slaDemoHint: Demo stuck mode is on (FULFILLMENT_SLA_DEMO_STUCK=true) — all in-progress groups appear stuck.

panel.blockingHint: Groups still in New or Processing. Use reminders for slow vendors.
panel.notesHint: Ops only — not visible to vendor or customer.
panel.notifyCustomerHint: Shows a banner on the customer order page. No email is sent in this version.
panel.delayTemplate: Your order is taking longer than expected. We are following up with our sellers and will update you soon.
panel.cancelVendorHint: Multi-vendor only. Cancels this vendor's items, adjusts totals, and refunds the buyer when applicable.
panel.cancelConfirm: Remove this vendor from the order? This cannot be undone.
panel.slaBypassHint: SLA bypass active — stuck flags are disabled.
panel.slaDemoHint: Demo stuck mode active — groups show as overdue for UAT.

adminReturns.title: Returns
adminReturns.subtitle: Review customer return cases and advance statuses (refund automation is not included in this slice).

detail.noTransitions: No status updates are available from this state.
detail.rejectionReasonRequired: A rejection reason is required when rejecting a return.
detail.rejectionReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this return is being rejected (shown to the customer).

adminPlatformSettings.title: Platform settings
adminPlatformSettings.subtitle: Edit business rules per marketplace — super admin only.

fields.affiliatePoolPercent: Affiliate pool (% of eligible order amount)

hints.affiliateLevels: Level rates are a percentage of the affiliate pool, not the full order.
hints.commissionSplit: Vendor and platform shares must total 100%.
hints.appliesToNewOrders: Changes apply to new orders and future calculations only — not past orders or pending ledger rows.
hints.policiesOptional: Optional per-market legal copy. URLs take precedence when both URL and text are set.
hints.paymentGateways: These controls show or hide planned gateways for customers. They remain disabled until their live adapters and credentials are installed.

adminPlatformSettings.neverUpdated: Using seeded defaults (not edited in dashboard yet).

adminMarkets.title: Marketplaces
adminMarkets.subtitle: Enable or disable country stores. Saudi Arabia stays the default and cannot be turned off.
adminMarkets.defaultMarketNote: Disabling a market blocks its subdomain and removes it from the market picker. Existing orders and wallets are preserved.
adminMarkets.cannotDisableDefault: Saudi Arabia is the default marketplace and cannot be disabled.
adminMarkets.lastActiveError: At least one marketplace must remain active.

marketUnavailable.title: Marketplace unavailable
marketUnavailable.description: The {market} store is currently disabled. Choose another marketplace or visit Saudi Arabia.

adminUsers.title: Users
adminUsers.subtitle: Accounts and role assignments (read-only in v1).

adminSettlements.title: Pending earnings
adminSettlements.subtitle: Release affiliate commissions and vendor earnings from pending to available wallet balance. Manual release stays available after automated settlement is added.

panel.title: Pending earnings queue
panel.hint: Select rows and release to move funds to each user's available balance. You can release before the 7-day window.

adminSettlementsReleased.title: Released earnings
adminSettlementsReleased.subtitle: Read-only audit of earnings already released to available wallet balance.

panel.title: Released earnings history

adminWithdrawals.subtitle: Review affiliate payout requests: approve, decline, or mark paid after transfer.

list.declineMessage: Decline the payout request for {user}? Locked funds will return to their available balance.

adminAffiliateDetail.genealogyTruncated: Tree truncated — open detail again with fewer members to see more.

kyc.customerSubtitle: Upload your national ID and IBAN proof to withdraw cashback from your wallet.
kyc.affiliateSubtitle: Upload your national ID and IBAN to receive affiliate commission payouts.
kyc.vendorSubtitle: Upload commercial registration, license, tax certificate, representative ID, and IBAN.

panel.loginRequired: Sign in to upload and manage your verification documents.
panel.expiredBanner: Your identity document has expired. Upload a new one and submit for review.
panel.pendingBanner: Upload all required documents and submit each for admin review.
panel.uploadHint: PDF, JPG, or PNG — max 10 MB.
panel.allowedTypesHint: Only PDF, JPEG, JPG, and PNG files can be uploaded.
panel.invalidFileType: Only PDF, JPEG, JPG, or PNG files are allowed.
panel.cancelUploadSuccess: Upload removed. You can choose a new file.
panel.replaceHint: Upload a new file to replace the approved document. Submit it for review — admin must accept it before it replaces the current approval.
panel.pendingReviewHint: Awaiting admin review. You cannot upload another file until this review is complete.
panel.replaceConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to resubmit {document}? Admin must review it again. Withdrawals stay blocked until the new file is approved.

adminKyc.title: KYC review
adminKyc.subtitle: Browse vendors and customers, review documents, and request updates.

list.empty: No verification records match this filter.
list.copyEmailSuccess: Email copied — send your reminder from your mail app.
list.requestUpdateSuccess: Update requested — user will see a banner on their KYC page.
list.defaultUpdateMessage: Please upload an updated version of this document.
list.defaultRejectReason: Document unclear or does not match requirements. Please re-upload.
